title: Document Specialized Agent Guardrails
description: Document the new template-backed guardrail system, including template locations, runtime behavior, missing-template failure expectations, and how blocked role-scope handoffs appear during bead inspection.
acceptance_criteria: Repository documentation explains where built-in agent guardrail templates live and that they are the primary editable source of truth.
Documentation explains how worker prompts consume guardrails and how missing-template failures behave.
Documentation explains blocked role-scope results and how applied guardrail context can be inspected via bead state or bead show output.
Examples remain aligned with the implemented built-in agent types and current repository structure.

handoff_summary.completed: Added a README guardrails section describing `templates/agents/` as the built-in source of truth, the five current agent templates, prompt injection behavior, failure semantics when a template is missing, and how to inspect blocked role-scope handoffs through `orchestrator bead show`. Updated `specs/specialized-agent-guardrails.md` so the implementation snapshot and examples align with the current code, including persisted guardrail metadata, `worker_prompt_context`, `guardrails_applied` history, and blocked handoff fields.
handoff_summary.remaining: No further documentation changes were required within this bead's scope.
handoff_summary.risks: Docs were aligned against current source files, but I did not run automated tests because the changes are documentation-only. Downstream agents editing `README.md` or the guardrail spec should recheck examples against `src/codex_orchestrator/prompts.py`, `src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py`, and `src/codex_orchestrator/storage.py` if those files move again.
handoff_summary.next_action: Review or merge the documentation updates alongside the B0004 implementation changes they describe.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Low. This bead only touched documentation, but `README.md` is a likely merge hotspot if sibling beads also update top-level usage docs.

conflict_risks: Low. This bead only touched documentation, but `README.md` is a likely merge hotspot if sibling beads also update top-level usage docs.

execution_history.summary: Updated repository documentation for the template-backed specialized agent guardrail system, including template locations, runtime prompt behavior, missing-template failure expectations, and blocked role-scope inspection paths.
